# Visual Studio
# =========================

*.suo
*.user
*.userosscache
*.sln.docstates

# =========================
bin/
obj/
Debug/
Release/

# =========================
project.lock.json
project.fragment.lock.json
artifacts/

# =========================
# Logs
# =========================
*.log
logs/

# =========================
# Database / Local files
# =========================
*.mdf
*.ldf
*.sqlite
*.db

# =========================

Thumbs.db

# =========================
# Node (if frontend used)
# =========================

npm-debug.log*
yarn-debug.log*
yarn-error.log*

# =========================
.env
.env.*

# =========================
publish/
wwwroot/dist/
